scripts.dev:server: cd src/server && cross-env PORT=5000 npm run dev
scripts.dev:client: cd src/client && cross-env PORT=3000 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:5000 npm run dev
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" --names server,client --kill-others-on-fail
scripts.e2e:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose-test.yml up -d postgres redis && concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" --kill-others-on-fail & npx wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npx cypress run --browser chrome --headless; EXIT_CODE=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose-test.yml down -v; exit $EXIT_CODE
scripts.e2e:ci: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" --kill-others-on-fail & npx wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npx cypress run --browser chrome --headless
scripts.test: cd src/server && npm test && cd ../client && npm test
